notes: Architecture Q1: auto-select true best model (min Brier) rather than fixed stacked-first priority. Hypothesis: XGB alone beats stacked for 2024 enough to lift average.

name: arch-dynamic-ensemble
notes: Architecture Q1 variant: per-season dynamic selection — use XGB-only when XGB raw Brier beats DC raw Brier on the calibration fold, else use stacked. Hypothesis: avoids DC drag in 2024 while keeping DC synergy for 2022-2023.

name: cal-beta
notes: Beta calibration (Kull et al. 2017) with abm parameters; betacal now installed; first real test of this method on this harness

name: cal-temperature-seed42
notes: Temperature scaling with seed=42 fixed; establishes reproducible variance baseline. Iteration 3 noted cal_err varies ~0.02 across stochastic XGB runs; this pins one deterministic run for comparison.

name: merge-confirm-cal2stage
notes: Post greedy-merge: +PythagLuck registered + 2-stage post-stack Platt as new default

name: feat-pythagluck
notes: Rolling Pythagorean over-performance (actual pts minus expected pts over last 10 matches, soccer exponent 1.83) as luck/regression signal

name: cal-2stage-postack
notes: Two-stage calibration: temperature per-model, then isotonic second pass on stacked ensemble output
